name: Dan Aykroyd
blurb: An original SNL 'Not Ready for Prime Time Player'.
bio: Dan Aykroyd is a Canadian comedian, actor, and writer who was part of Saturday Night Live's original 1975 cast, famous for fast-talking pitchman characters and the Blues Brothers. He co-wrote and starred in Ghostbusters.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
